title: pelargonium × beadoniae
intro: Pelargonium × beadoniae, also known as Cape Balm or Beadonia, is a hybrid plant belonging to the geranium family, known for its distinctive appearance and fragrance. Its leaves and flowers contain essential oils with anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which are often used to treat various health issues. The medicinal properties of Pelargonium × beadoniae have been traditionally used to treat digestive problems, skin irritations, and respiratory issues, offering relief from symptoms such as nausea, fever, and sore throats. The plant is commonly prepared as a tea, tincture, or infused oil, which can be used to harness its health benefits and herbal properties.
